# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties)

############################### Server Basics ###############################

# The id of the broker. This must be set to a unique integer for each broker.
broker.id=1

# The listeners to publish metrics and admin services to. This is useful if you want to connect to kafka from outside the cluster.
listeners=PLAINTEXT://:9092

# The directory where Kafka will store its data.
log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka

############################### Log Basics ###############################

# The number of threads to execute index tasks on.
num.index.threads=3

# The maximum size a partition can grow to before we force a flush to disk.
log.segment.bytes=1073741824

# The interval at which log segments are checked to see if they can be deleted according to the retention policies.
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

############################### Zookeeper Connection ###############################

# The connection string for the zookeeper connection in the form host:port. Multiple hosts can be given as host1:port1,host2:port2, and the port will be c
ustomized if the broker is behind a NAT.
zookeeper.connect=localhost:2181
